name: High Belt (Wee)
pedagogy: A high-belt set-up on a descending 5-3-1 triad sung on a closed 'wee' (/wi/). As belt climbs above C5 it shifts from chest-dominant toward a bright, narrow head-voice mix — the closed /i/ vowel keeps the resonance forward and the larynx from over-weighting, so the top stays connected, not shouted. Source: Broadway belt pedagogy (Roll 2016, Journal of Voice). The app scores pitch; keep the tone narrow and forward.
